title: Panini8 - LMS Platform
description: Enterprise platform with optimized quiz modules, automated PAN card OCR processing, and AI-powered analytics — all backed by zero-downtime deployment infrastructure.

title: Filibot - AI Powered LMS
description: AI-powered evaluation framework with intelligent content moderation, automated analytics reporting, and data-driven insights that reduced manual effort by 70%.

title: Shyam Metalics - Fabricator Management Portal
description: SEL Tiger Pro is a role-based claims management platform built for fabricators, dealers, distributors, and admins to manage product purchase claims and reward points.

title: Abekus - AI Powered Learning & Hiring Platform
description: Abekus is an AI-driven career development and recruitment platform that connects job seekers with companies through skill-based hiring. The platform offers adaptive learning, resume analysis, skill assessments, and AI-powered job matching to help candidates improve their abilities and enable recruiters to discover verified talent faster.

title: Zervise - AI Helpdesk & Customer Support Platform
description: Zervise is an AI-powered helpdesk and CRM platform that centralizes customer support across channels like Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp, Instagram, and web chat. It enables businesses to automate customer queries using AI chatbots, manage support tickets, and streamline task workflows, improving team productivity and response times.
